synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-21974 Important: Oracle Linux 8 mingw-expat security update
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-21974

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-21974.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
mingw32-expat-2.5.0-1.el8_10.noarch.rpm
mingw64-expat-2.5.0-1.el8_10.noarch.rpm



SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/mingw-expat-2.5.0-1.el8_10.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-59375




Description of changes:

[2.5.0-1]
- Rebase to version 2.5.0
- Fix the following CVEs
  CVE-2023-52425 CVE-2024-28757 CVE-2024-45490
  CVE-2024-45491 CVE-2024-45492 CVE-2024-50602
  CVE-2024-8176 CVE-2025-59375
- Resolves: RHEL-114628
